title: Fractured Cow
description: Horror mod that adds Fractured Cow, this cow is not normal...
body:
Fractured Cow is a horror mod.

Your walking around in a plains biome, you here a "Moo", you think it's just a normal cow... If only you knew...

-------------------------------------------------
**SPAWN**: Spawns in all forest and plains biome,

The Fractured Cow will only spawn in the dark,

-------------------------------------------------


**FEATURES**: 

The Fractured Cow deals 8 attack damage,                                     

It will knock you back like a ravanger,

It does not break blocks or anything

-------------------------------------------------


Mod made in Mcreator,

Model made in Blockbench.

I hope you injoy this mod!
